ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered, canceled) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discount policy applied to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_discount_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_id") REFERENCES discount_policies ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discount_policies" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount policy */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount policy (e.g., percentage, fixed) */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of discount applied */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount policy */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount policy */,
  "minimum_spend" REAL /* Minimum spend required to apply the discount */,
  "maximum_discount" REAL /* Maximum discount amount that can be applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES customer_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "min_purchase_amount" REAL /* Minimum purchase amount required to qualify for the category */,
  "max_purchase_amount" REAL /* Maximum purchase amount for the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the category was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_category_map" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the customer belongs to */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date the customer was assigned to the category */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object to store role permissions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
